title: Music Video Anime Brief
description: Creative brief produced by the Research Director for a beat-synced anime music video. Distinct from the general brief — it carries the music_track and anime_theme as first-class fields, with the asset_route pre-decision recorded for the proposal stage.

hook.description: One-line creative direction (not a teaser hook; this is for internal use)

tone.description: Motion register — drives cut density in script/scene_plan

style.description: Visual style reference; e.g. 'anime music video (AMV/MAD)' or specific anime title if explicit

target_duration_seconds.description: Total video length; typically equals music_track.duration_seconds

metadata.oneOf_music_track_consistency_comment: The oneOf below enforces that music_track_source, music_track_license, music_track_requires_user_ack, and music_track_user_ack_obtained agree. This is at the metadata object level (peer of properties), so it applies across the four sibling fields. The three valid combinations are listed in the description.

music_track_path.description: Absolute path to the locked music file under projects/<project-id>/assets/music/

music_track_source.description: How the music file was acquired. Drives license/requires_user_ack consistency (see music_track_license).

music_track_license.description: License tag for the music file. MUST be consistent with music_track_source — see music_track_source_license_consistency.

music_track_requires_user_ack.description: True iff music_track_source == 'ytsearch_artist_track'. Schema enforces this via music_track_source_license_consistency.

music_track_user_ack_obtained.description: True if the user explicitly acknowledged the license risk. When requires_user_ack is true, this MUST be true before compose runs (compose-director will reject otherwise). When requires_user_ack is false, this is null.

audiomap_path.description: Absolute path to artifacts/audiomap.json produced by beat_anchor.py

beat_grid_reliable.description: True if audiomap.bpm and audiomap.beats_sec are trustworthy for this track; false for calm/ambient tracks where the grid is a metronome imposed on the music

anime_theme.description: Either explicit (named anime) or vibe-register based

palette.description: Color world cues (e.g. 'Sakurajima pink + Fujisawa sunset orange')

asset_route_options.description: What asset routes were surfaced by research. The actual route is decided at proposal stage.

user_provided_urls.description: URLs the user dropped for reference clips

ytsearch_candidates.description: Suggested ytsearch:<keywords> queries if user did not provide URLs

agnes_opt_in.description: True ONLY if user has explicitly said '用 AI 生成 / AI 画 / AI 出图'

visual_references.description: URLs to visual reference stills / key art / AMV references
